title: Wire NEXT_PUBLIC_POSTHOG_KEY into Vercel env + .env.local
description: PostHog provider is wired in src/components/analytics/posthog-provider.tsx but no-ops without NEXT_PUBLIC_POSTHOG_KEY. Steps: (1) create PostHog project, (2) add key to .env.local, (3) vercel env add NEXT_PUBLIC_POSTHOG_KEY (preview + prod), (4) redeploy, (5) verify pageview in PostHog dashboard. Default host is us.i.posthog.com — swap to eu.i.posthog.com if EU project.

title: Add Dr. Priyesh Kamat + Renuka Rai photos to public/team/
description: Photos live in #om-sai-dental Slack but cannot be pulled programmatically (claude.ai Slack MCP returns rendered image blocks, no local token/download URL). Manually download and save as public/team/dr-priyesh-kamat.png and public/team/renuka-rai.png. resolveTeam() in src/lib/team.ts auto-detects them — no code change needed. Until then, initials-avatar fallback renders.
close_reason: Photos placed in public/team/ (dr-priyesh-kamat.png 1296x1599, renuka-rai.png 631x773); resolveTeam auto-serves them.

title: Configure foxguard pre-commit hook
description: foxguard installed as devDep. Optional: run `foxguard init` to install local pre-commit hook for security scanning on staged changes. Also consider adding `security:scan` npm script.
